_comment: Each entry is a showcase widget. wdgt_demo_* ids are resolved server-side by api/widgets/_demo-fixtures.js.

widgets.label: Turntable Showcase
widgets.tagline: Hero banner for sites — auto-rotate, no UI.

widgets.label: Animation Gallery
widgets.tagline: Click through every clip on a rigged avatar.

widgets.label: Talking Agent
widgets.tagline: Embodied chat — your agent, your site, your tone.

widgets.label: ERC-8004 Passport
widgets.tagline: On-chain identity card for any agent.

widgets.label: Hotspot Tour
widgets.tagline: Explorable 3D scenes with annotated points of interest.

widgets.label: Pump.fun Live Feed
widgets.tagline: Solana agent narrates pump.fun claims and graduations in real time.
features: Filter by tier and event kind

widgets.label: Smart Money Feed
widgets.tagline: Live buy/sell activity from KOL and whale wallets for any token.

widgets.label: Live Trades Canvas
